meaning: n.列,行,排,层,等级vt.使造成递升排列,使层叠vi.成递升徘列
examples: We have introduced an extra tier of administration.
Tier 1 cities like Beijing have a couple of hundred high-speed trains stopping at the city every day.
The final tier is the so-called Bottom of the Pyramid (BOP).
Even as top-tier Japanese institutions go bankrupt or post huge losses, Orix has remained consistently profitable.
Former Senator John Edwards is often described as number three in the three candidate top tier of Democrats.
